prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约7473→3221→2386→3707→3877名。2021年位次较高，2022–2023年显著上升（位次数字减小），2024年起连续两年后移，近2年累计后移约1491名；2025年基准约3877名；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年122人、2022年176人、2023年129人、2024年136人、2025年137人；2026年计划145人，较2025年扩招约5.8%，扩招对竞争略有缓解，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第13名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情（论文数据存疑等），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度为"较热"，短视频平台关注度中等。2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常信号，但2025年声誉评价转为偏正面，整体舆情影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科达23个，其中工商管理、生态学为A+，中国语言文学、数学、物理学、生物学、基础医学、药学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学为A，临床医学、计算机科学与技术、法学、应用经济学等为A-，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学等热门专业持续高热；江西省2026年高考总人数约474,900人，较2025年（472,480人）基本持平，竞争压力变化不大；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖高校，对江西省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西省招生计划占比较为稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近2年持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（约5.8%）、声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度、本省考生总数基本持平等因素，在2025年基准3877名基础上，预计2026年最低位次继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约4013名，区间3531–4495名。

- 口腔医学。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（3531–4495名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如3500名以内），可重点冲刺临床医学（八年医）和计算机类等王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（约4500名），建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 7473→3221→2386→3707→3877. The ranking was higher in 2021, significantly improved (ranking number decreased) in 2022–2023, and then shifted backward for two consecutive years starting from 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1491 places over the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 3877. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for Science/Physics Category: 122 in 2021, 176 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 136 in 2024, 137 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 145, an increase of about 5.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, maintaining strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion (e.g., questionable paper data), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', with moderate attention on short video platforms. There were abnormal signals in admission scores in 2022–2023, but the reputation evaluation turned relatively positive in 2025, with overall public opinion impact limited; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A in Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Basic Medicine, Pharmacy, Marxist Theory, and Public Health and Preventive Medicine, and A- in Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, Law, and Applied Economics, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly sought after; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, basically unchanged from 2025 (472,480), so competitive pressure remains similar; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top university in South China, with strong regional appeal to candidates from Jiangxi Province; the proportion of enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings over the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 5.8%), the somewhat negative reputation that may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, and the basically unchanged total number of local candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 3877, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to continue to shift backward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4013, with a range of 3531–4495.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (3531–4495), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3500), you can aim for top-tier majors like Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 4500), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 487, 521, 437, 469, and 466 respectively. Overall fluctuation is small, with rankings ranging narrowly between 437 and 521 from 2021 to 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 466. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jiangxi Province: 50 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a reduction of about 11.1% compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and tend to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with top-tier comprehensive strength, strongly attractive to liberal arts students as well; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves academic misconduct incidents in science, engineering, and medicine, with relatively limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', with moderate overall attention; Sun Yat-sen University has prominent liberal arts advantages: Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A+, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Sociology A-, Philosophy A-, Chinese History A-, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law, Economics, and Business Administration continue to attract attention; the number of history category examinees in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is approximately 207,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), roughly the same as 2025 (206,000); Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to liberal arts students in Jiangxi Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the approximately 11.1% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (intensified competition), and the limited impact of reputation and public opinion on liberal arts, based on the 2025 baseline of 466, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 435, with a range of 383 to 487.
